steps.title: Compare the service periods
steps.content: Margaret Emery served from 1844 to 1862, while Clara Bennett served from 1925 to 1941. The clearest difference in the notes is that Emery worked in an earlier century than Bennett.

steps.title: Reject similarity or single examples
steps.content: Choice A emphasizes what the two lighthouse keepers shared. Choice B and Choice D discuss only one keeper, so neither emphasizes a difference between them. The sentence comparing their centuries of service matches the goal. The answer is C.
